content: Gwilin: That breeze coming off Lake Geir tonight... smells like bass and wet pussy. Almost makes me forget Temba yelled at me again for cutting logs too short. Damn woman acts like I pissed in her mead. Klimmek: Heh, least you ain’t got Bassianus lounging in your house, sniffing around Fastred’s skirts like a starving skeever. Thought she fancied me, but nah—dick’s too small for her tastes, I guess. Gwilin: Ah, come on now. Fastred’s sweet, but she’s just a girl who don’t know what she wants yet. Seen her watching you haul fish from the river—looked like she wanted more than just your catch, if you catch my drift. Klimmek: Yeah? Well, Bassianus don’t just —he spears her proper. Bastard parades around like he owns the village just ‘cause his dick whispered sweet nothings to Lynly last summer. Gwilin: Lynly?! Gods, that woman’s thighs could crack walnuts. Wouldn’t mind her singing me to sleep while riding my— Klimmek: Speak of the damn Devil... Look alive, elf. Here comes Fastred’s tits bouncing our way.

Klimmek: Ugh, and she’s got Bassianus' hand up her skirt already. Shoulda known. Gwilin: Don’t stew over it, friend. Plenty of fish in Lake Geir—some even bite easier than others. Klimmek: Bah. Ain’t about the fish, Gwilin. It’s about pride. Gwilin: Pride sinks ships and stiff cocks, they say. But hey—sky’s clear, stars are out… and I hear old Wilhelm’s got a fresh batch of Black-Briar mead down at the inn. Klimmek: Now that’s something worth chasing. Lead the way.
